email_preferences.title: Email preferences
email_preferences.headline: Choose what you want to receive.
email_preferences.description: Turn each Stampeo email category on or off. Essential emails (invoices, confirmations, security) are always sent.
email_preferences.error_invalid_token: This link is no longer valid. Sign in to your dashboard to manage your preferences.
email_preferences.error_generic: Something went wrong. Try again or contact us.

reengagement.label: Activation reminders
reengagement.description: 24-hour and 7-day nudges to help you finish setting up your program.

marketing.label: Tips and updates
marketing.description: Tips, best practices, and product news.

product_updates.label: Product announcements
product_updates.description: Important changes to the service you use.

email_preferences.transactional_note: Transactional emails (receipts, password resets, OTPs, payment alerts) cannot be turned off.
